evals.prompt: Create an IEEE-style campus network figure with core, distribution, and access layers in grayscale.
evals.expected_output: A diagram with academic (grayscale) theme showing three network layers in IEEE-compatible styling.
assertions: Output uses academic theme with grayscale palette
Contains core, distribution, and access layer modules
SVG or drawio output is grayscale-safe (no color-only semantics)
Node labels are <= 14 characters
meta.profile is set to academic-paper

evals.prompt: Create a research workflow figure for a paper showing data collection, preprocessing, modeling, validation, and reporting.
evals.expected_output: An academic-themed research pipeline diagram with 5 sequential stages.
assertions: Output uses academic or academic-color theme
Contains all 5 workflow stages as nodes
Edges use primary connector type for main flow
SVG export is grayscale-safe
meta.profile is set to academic-paper

evals.prompt: Create a paper-ready system architecture overview with client, API, worker, and storage layers.
evals.expected_output: An academic-themed system architecture with 4 layers suitable for publication.
assertions: Output uses academic or academic-color theme
Contains client, API, worker, and storage layers
Nodes use semantic types (service, database, user)
SVG export preserves readability in grayscale
meta.profile is set to academic-paper

evals.prompt: Create an ablation-study figure comparing baseline and two variants before a shared evaluation block.
evals.expected_output: A diagram with branching paths from baseline/variants converging at an evaluation node.
assertions: Output uses academic or academic-color theme
Contains baseline and at least two variant branches
Branches converge at a shared evaluation block
SVG export is grayscale-safe
meta.profile is set to academic-paper

evals.prompt: Create a cloud reference architecture using gateway, compute, async queue, and object storage.
evals.expected_output: A tech-blue themed cloud architecture diagram with 4 key infrastructure components.
assertions: Output uses tech-blue or similar engineering theme
Contains gateway, compute, queue, and storage nodes
Nodes use appropriate semantic types (service, queue, database)
Edge routing follows orthogonal style
Edge quality: no overlapping arrows, minimum 30px last segment

evals.prompt: Create a microservices architecture with API gateway, auth service, order service, event bus, and PostgreSQL.
evals.expected_output: A microservices diagram with 5 components and appropriate connectors.
assertions: Output uses tech-blue or similar engineering theme
Contains all 5 specified components
Database node uses database semantic type
Service-to-database edges use data connector type
Edge quality: no overlapping arrows, clear routing

evals.prompt: Create a network topology with firewall, core switch, access switch, and wireless APs.
evals.expected_output: A network topology diagram with hierarchical layout showing 4 network components.
assertions: Output uses tech-blue or similar engineering theme
Contains firewall, core switch, access switch, and AP nodes
Layout shows clear network hierarchy
Edge quality: orthogonal routing, no crossings where avoidable
meta.profile is set to engineering-review

evals.prompt: Create a horizontal tech-blue login flowchart with Start, Login Form, Validate, Success, and Error.
evals.expected_output: A simple horizontal flowchart with 5 nodes in tech-blue theme.
assertions: Output uses tech-blue theme
Contains exactly 5 nodes: Start, Login Form, Validate, Success, Error
Layout direction is horizontal
Terminal nodes use terminal semantic type
Decision/branch is present for validate step

evals.prompt: Create a dense architecture diagram with shared event flows, two databases, and cross-service dependencies.
evals.expected_output: A complex architecture diagram that passes edge-quality validation.
assertions: Output uses tech-blue or similar engineering theme
Contains at least two database nodes
Event flows use data or optional connector types
Edge quality: no corner connection points, no shared face slots
Edge quality: last segment >= 30px, labels offset from edges
meta.profile is set to engineering-review

evals.prompt: Create a paper figure for a training pipeline including the loss formula $$L = -\sum y_i \log(\hat{y}_i)$$.
evals.expected_output: An academic-themed training pipeline diagram with LaTeX formula rendering.
assertions: Output uses academic or academic-color theme
Contains a formula node with the loss function
LaTeX formula is properly formatted
SVG export preserves formula readability
meta.profile is set to academic-paper
